name: pixi-steam-template
description: PixiJS v8 + Electron + Steamworks template. Browser for dev, Electron for Steam.

scripts.build:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir --config.directories.output=dist-electron/mac && node scripts/postbuild.js mac
scripts.build:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win dir --config.directories.output=dist-electron/win && node scripts/postbuild.js win
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux dir --config.directories.output=dist-electron/linux && node scripts/postbuild.js linux
